deployment.author: diwakar453t
deployment.message:
fix: add global Axios interceptor for X-Tenant-ID + refactor slices to use api instance
- Global axios interceptor in main.tsx injects Authorization and X-Tenant-ID headers on ALL requests (covers 23+ slices using raw axios) - Refactored studentsSlice.ts and teachersSlice.ts to use api instance with proper trailing slashes - Set redirect_slashes=False on api_router to prevent 307 header drops
